_comment: Join / Membership page copy. ⚠️ The payment tier buttons, prices, and the PayPal checkout are managed in code — the 'Membership tiers' section here is display text only and does not change what people are charged.

seo.title: Join · Sakyadhita
seo.description: Become a member of Sakyadhita — a global network of 5,000+ Buddhist women across 45 countries. Annual membership from $15, lifetime from $150.

hero.title: Join Sakyadhita
hero.lede: Become part of a global network of 5,000+ Buddhist women across 45 countries.

cards.title: The newsletter
cards.text: Original scholarship and member essays from Buddhist women across 45 countries — mailed to your door once a year.

cards.title: Conference access
cards.text: Stand among thousands of Buddhist women — member-rate entry to the biennial international conference and regional gatherings.

cards.title: A voice in decisions
cards.text: Help decide where Sakyadhita stands on ordination, education, and advocacy — your vote shapes the network's direction.

cards.title: Branch connection
cards.text: We introduce you directly to your nearest branch or chapter, so community is never more than an introduction away.

tiers.heading: Membership is open to everyone
tiers.text: Every member receives the same benefits. Reduced rates keep membership accessible to nuns, students, and those who are unemployed, while lifetime and regular dues help fund scholarships across the network.

groups.heading: Annual
groups.note: Renews automatically every year. Cancel anytime in your PayPal account — or email service.sakyadhita@gmail.com and we will cancel it for you.

groups.heading: Lifetime
groups.note: A one-time payment — pay once and you are a Sakyadhita member for life.

payModal.title: Pay with PayPal
payModal.note: 🔒 Processed securely by PayPal — card payments accepted, no PayPal account needed.

newsletter.heading: Subscribe to our newsletter
newsletter.text: Join our email list for newsletters, event news, and stories from the network.

success.title: Welcome to Sakyadhita!
success.text: Your payment was received and your membership is confirmed. PayPal has emailed you a receipt.
